recommendations.title: Raazi
recommendations.overview: An Indian spy is married to a Pakistani military officer during the Indo-Pakistani War of 1971.

recommendations.title: In Between
recommendations.overview: The film captures the daily duality of three young Palestinian women in Tel Aviv, caught between hometown tradition and big city abandon, and the price they must pay for a lifestyle that seems obvious to many: the freedom to work, party, have sex, an

recommendations.title: My Beautiful Laundrette
recommendations.overview: A young Pakistani Briton manages a rundown laundrette with his lover while dealing with tension in his family, the local Pakistani community, and a persistent mob of skinheads.

recommendations.title: The Eagle Huntress
recommendations.overview: Follow Aisholpan, a 13-year-old girl, as she trains to become the first female in twelve generations of her Kazakh family to become an eagle hunter, and rise to the pinnacle of a tradition that has been typically been handed down from father to son f

recommendations.title: Loosies
recommendations.overview: A young pickpocket in the New York subways, living a fast, free, lifestyle is confronted by a woman whom he had a one night affair with, she informs him that she is now pregnant with his child, he must now choose between continuing the lifestyle he l

recommendations.title: The Yearling
recommendations.overview: Jody convinces his parents to allow him to adopt a young deer, but what will happen if the deer misbehaves?

recommendations.title: The Book of Life
recommendations.overview: The journey of Manolo, a young man who is torn between fulfilling the expectations of his family and following his heart. Before choosing which path to follow, he embarks on an incredible adventure that spans fantastical worlds where he must face his

recommendations.title: The Jazz Singer
recommendations.overview: A young Jewish man is torn between tradition and individuality when his old-fashioned family objects to his career as a jazz singer. This is the first full length feature film to use synchronized sound, and is the original film musical.

recommendations.title: 13 Exorcisms
recommendations.overview: After participating in a séance, young Laura begins to behave strangely. Alarmed, her parents ask Father Olmedo, one of the few exorcists authorized by the Vatican to intervene in cases of demonic possession, for help.

recommendations.title: The World to Come
recommendations.overview: In 1856, two women forge a close connection despite their isolation on the American frontier.
